current.summary: MOAT spec issue #8 fully resolved with locked design decisions; README rewritten; repo metadata updated; all changes pushed.

activeWork.description: MOAT specification revision - issue #8 revocation mechanisms resolution
activeWork.progress: Issue #8 fully locked: decisions 3-5 finalized (compromised hard-block no override, unreachable feed fail-open with warnings, revoked_at registry-asserted). Bug fix applied to contradiction. OWASP alignment corrected (CICD-SEC-3 removed, AST09 added). Open issues #9-#14 created with defined scope. README rewritten from scratch. Repo description and metadata updated to protocol-focused language. All changes committed and pushed.

recentDecisions: Decision 3: compromised remains hard block, no user override. Added incident-response reality.
Decision 4: Unreachable feed fails open with URL, staleness window, last fetch timestamp.
Decision 5: revoked_at is registry-asserted, no skew window. Grace-period risk flagged.
nextSteps: Resolve MOAT open issues #9-#14 (identity-bound revocation, publisher auth, federation security, algorithm deprecation, offline verification, blocklist federation)
Resume syllago CLI development if MOAT work complete

context.notes: MOAT spec is clean and complete for issue #8. All design decisions documented and pushed. README provides clear entry point for new readers. Open issues scoped and ready for prioritization.
